name: High-dose tadalafil improved some microcirculation and metabolic markers but not insulin resistance in MAKROTAD
statement: In a small type 2 diabetes crossover trial, tadalafil 20 mg daily for 6 weeks did not improve whole-body insulin resistance versus placebo, but the abstract reports improved microcirculation/endothelial function signals, lower HbA1c, and more muscle pain, dyspepsia, and headache.
population_or_context: Adults with well-controlled type 2 diabetes and BMI 27-40 kg/m2.
time_horizon: 6 weeks per treatment period with 8-week washout.
quantitative_note: Full analysis set N=18; tadalafil effect on insulin resistance was neutral. HbA1c mean difference was -2.50 mmol/mol (95% CI -4.20 to -0.78; P=0.005).

source_locator.quote_or_paraphrase_note: Abstract reports neutral insulin-resistance primary result, HbA1c estimate, microcirculation/endothelial-function interpretation, and adverse-event pattern.

caveats: Type 2 diabetes and overweight/obesity population rather than healthy users.
Microcirculation and endothelial-function details require full-text extraction before quantitative synthesis.
population_profile: Adults with well-controlled T2D; partly overlaps men over 40 but is not mostly healthy 30-50 evidence.
tadalafil_exposure: Tadalafil 20 mg once daily for 6 weeks.
indication_context: Experimental metabolic-vascular tadalafil trial in T2D.
endpoint_measure: Whole-body insulin resistance, HbA1c, microcirculation, endothelial function, and tolerability.
effect_estimate: Neutral for whole-body insulin resistance; HbA1c mean difference -2.50 mmol/mol; qualitative abstract-level improvement in microcirculation/endothelial function.
safety_findings: Muscle pain, dyspepsia, and headache were more frequent with high-dose tadalafil; no serious-adverse-event difference appeared between treatments.
directness_to_target_population: Low to moderate for cardiometabolic-risk populations; low for healthy men age 30 to 50.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Small trial, secondary endpoint interpretation, full-text quantitative details not extracted, and no cardiovascular clinical outcomes.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence; transfer limit is T2D high-dose metabolic-vascular setting.
